tools.name: list_dir
tools.description: List contents of a directory inside the OpenClaw workspace sandbox. Use this to explore the workspace directory structure and see what files and subdirectories exist. All paths must be relative to /home/cmart/.openclaw/workspace. For reading file contents, use read_file instead.

path.description: Relative path to the directory to list (e.g., '01_AGENTS' or '.')

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read contents of a text file inside the OpenClaw workspace sandbox. Use this to view the contents of files like SKILL.md, configuration files, or any text-based documents. Only works with text files - for binary files use a different approach. For listing directories, use list_dir instead. For searching files by name, use search_files instead.

path.description: Relative path to the file to read (e.g., 'TOOLS.md' or '01_AGENTS/_REGISTRY.md')

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Write content to a text file inside the OpenClaw workspace sandbox. Use this to create new files or update existing text files with new content. The file will be created at the specified relative path within /home/cmart/.openclaw/workspace. For reading files, use read_file instead.

path.description: Relative path for the file to write (e.g., '07_OUTPUTS/test.txt')

content.description: Content to write to the file

tools.name: search_files
tools.description: Search for files by name pattern inside the OpenClaw workspace sandbox. Use this to find files matching a specific name or pattern. The search is performed on filenames within /home/cmart/.openclaw/workspace. For reading file contents, use read_file instead. For listing directory contents, use list_dir instead.

pattern.description: Search pattern to match against filenames (e.g., 'SKILL.md' or 'compa')

messages.content: Hey! I'm super excited to start exploring. Can you show me what files and folders are available in the workspace? I want to see what's in here!

Here's what's in your workspace! 📁

| Name | Type |
|------|------|
| 📂 01_AGENTS | Directory |
| 📂 02_SKILLS | Directory |
| 📂 03_PROMPTS | Directory |
| 📂 04_MEMORY | Directory |
| 📂 05_TOOLS | Directory |
| 📂 06_DATA | Directory |
| 📂 07_OUTPUTS | Directory |
| 📄 SKILL.md | File |
| 📄 TOOLS.md | File |

You've got a nicely organized workspace with folders for agents, skills, prompts, memory, tools, data, and outputs, plus two markdown files that might contain useful documentation.

Would you like me to dive into any of these folders or read either of the markdown files? Just let me know what you'd like to explore! 🚀
Omg yes! I'm so curious now. Can you search for any files related to Noah Cyrus or music content? I really want to find anything about her - maybe songs, info, or anything cool in here! 🎵

Here's what I found! 🎶

**"Noah" and "Cyrus" related files:**
- `noah_config.yaml`
- `noah_utils.py`
- `noah_runner.sh`
- `cyrus_trader.py`
- `cyrus_config.yaml`

**Music-related files:**
- `music_player.py`
- `music_library.md`
- `music_service.py`

Hmm, so I have some bad news and some good news! 😕

**The bad news:** The "noah" and "cyrus" files don't seem to be about Noah Cyrus the singer - they appear to be technical/programming files (like trading scripts and config files).

**The good news:** There IS some music-related content in here! 🎵

Would you like me to look into the music files (`music_library.md` or the others) to see what's in them? Or if you're interested in the Noah/Cyrus files, I can check those out too - maybe they're something cool you're working on!
Omg yes please! Can you read the music_library.md file? I'm so curious what kind of music stuff is in there! 🎶

{"status": "success", "tool": "read_file", "path": "music_library.md", "content": "# Music Library

## Artists

### Rock
- Led Zeppelin - IV (1971)
- Pink Floyd - The Dark Side of the Moon (1973)
- The Beatles - Abbey Road (1969)
- Queen - A Night at the Opera (1975)
- AC/DC - Back in Black (1980)

### Jazz
- Miles Davis - Kind of Blue (1959)
- John Coltrane - A Love Supreme (1965)
- Dave Brubeck - Time Out (1959)

### Classical
- Beethoven - Symphony No. 9
- Mozart - The Magic Flute
- Bach - Brandenburg Concertos

### Pop
- Michael Jackson - Thriller (1982)
- Madonna - Like a Virgin (1984)
- Prince - Purple Rain (1984)

## Playlists

1. Workout Mix - 45 min high energy
2. Study Session - Ambient and lo-fi
3. Road Trip Classics - 80s rock anthems
4. Dinner Party - Jazz and soft pop

## Total Tracks: 156

Last updated: 2024-01-15"}
messages.name: skill-tools-read_file

messages.content:
Haha, so this isn't about Noah Cyrus specifically, but check it out - it's a pretty cool music library! 🎧

## 📀 What's in the Music Library:

### Rock Legends 🎸
- Led Zeppelin - IV
- Pink Floyd - The Dark Side of the Moon
- The Beatles - Abbey Road
- Queen - A Night at the Opera
- AC/DC - Back in Black

### Jazz Classics 🎷
- Miles Davis - Kind of Blue
- John Coltrane - A Love Supreme
- Dave Brubeck - Time Out

### Classical Masterpieces 🎻
- Beethoven - Symphony No. 9
- Mozart - The Magic Flute
- Bach - Brandenburg Concertos

### Pop Icons 🪩
- Michael Jackson - Thriller
- Madonna - Like a Virgin
- Prince - Purple Rain

### Curated Playlists 📝
1. Workout Mix - 45 min high energy
2. Study Session - Ambient and lo-fi
3. Road Trip Classics - 80s rock anthems
4. Dinner Party - Jazz and soft pop

**Total Tracks:** 156 | **Last updated:** 2024-01-15

Pretty solid collection of classics! Too bad no Noah Cyrus specifically - she's got some bangers like "July" and "Goodbye"! 😄

Want me to check out any of the other music files or explore something else in the workspace?

Omg so cool that we found all that music stuff! Even though there wasn't anything specifically about Noah Cyrus in there, I still want to save my favorite findings about her! 🎵

Can you help me create a personal file where I can save all my favorite Noah Cyrus stuff? Like her songs I love (July and Goodbye are literally my jams), any info about her, and anything cool I find about her in the future! That way I'll have it all in one place 💕

function_call.name: skill-tools-write_file
function_call.arguments:
{"path": "my_noah_cyrus_favorites.md", "content": "# 🌟 My Noah Cyrus Favorites

> A personal collection of everything I love about Noah Cyrus! 💕

---

## 🎤 About Noah Cyrus

Noah Cyrus is an American singer and actress! She's the daughter of Billy Ray Cyrus and sister of Miley Cyrus. She started her career as a child actress and later became known for her pop music career.

---

## 🎵 My Favorite Songs

### Top Hits
- **July** - Such a vibe, love the lyrics!
- **Goodbye** - This song hits different 😢
- **We Are the World
- **

### Other Favorites
- [Add more songs here!]

---

## 📺 Music Videos
- [Add your favorite music videos here!]

---

## 🎬 Favorite Performances
- [Add performances you've loved here!]

---

## 📝 Fun Facts I Learn
- [Add any cool facts you discover!]

---

## 🔗 Links & Resources
- [Add useful links!]

---

## 📅 Last Updated
Last updated: [Today's date]

---

*More Noah Cyrus content to come! 🌈*"}

messages.content:
Yay! 🎉 I created your very own Noah Cyrus favorites file!

## 🌟 Your New File: `my_noah_cyrus_favorites.md`

It's ready and waiting for you to fill it with all things Noah Cyrus! Here's what's inside:

### 📂 What's In Your File:
- **About Noah Cyrus** - A intro section (I added some basic info to get you started!)
- **🎵 My Favorite Songs** - Where you can list "July" and "Goodbye" (your absolute jams! 🔥)
- **📺 Music Videos** - Save your faves here
- **🎬 Performances** - Concert and live performance memories
- **📝 Fun Facts** - Cool trivia you discover
- **🔗 Links & Resources** - Any helpful links

Now you'll have ALL your favorite Noah Cyrus stuff in one easy-to-find place! 💕

Would you like me to:
- **Add more details** to any section?
- **Search for more info** about Noah Cyrus to fill it in?
- **Explore more** of the workspace?

Let the Noah Cyrus collection begin! 🎶🌈
